sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65168" key="mastixhra/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαστῐχ-ηρά</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔμπλαστρος</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a plaster, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.15</biblScope> </bibl>(a) Z.</entryFree>
